name: Nano Brows
tagline: The most natural-looking brow technique available.
description: Using an ultra-fine digital needle, nano brows deposit pigment in hair-like strokes that mimic real brow hairs. Perfect for sparse or thin brows. Results last 1–3 years.

name: Lip Blush
tagline: Soft, full color that lasts for years.
description: A watercolor-style pigment technique that enhances your natural lip shape, adds definition, and gives a lasting flush of color — no liner needed.

name: Lash Line Enhancement
tagline: The illusion of thicker, fuller lashes.
description: Pigment is carefully placed between lash hairs to create the appearance of a fuller, defined lash line. Subtle yet transformative. Zero daily liner required.
